title: Hello World
author: Ada Lovelace
excerpt: The first post on this blog. Welcome!
body: This is the first post. We are testing the hadars source plugin system, which is modelled after Gatsby's sourceNodes API.

title: GraphQL in hadars
author: Alan Turing
excerpt: How hadars infers a GraphQL schema from source plugin nodes.
body: The hadars source system runs Gatsby-compatible source plugins, collects nodes into an in-memory store, infers a GraphQL schema, and exposes it via a GraphiQL IDE at /__hadars/graphql during dev mode.

title: Static export with data
author: Grace Hopper
excerpt: Pre-render pages that depend on source plugin data.
body: The paths() function receives a graphql executor backed by your source nodes. Query for all posts, map to URL paths, and hadars pre-renders each one to index.html + index.json sidecars.
